Interface IMosaicFunction3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control mosaic function.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("9A90A3D9-9ED9-4DF3-87B1-F1F563928C98")]
public interface IMosaicFunction3 : IMosaicFunction2, IMosaicFunction
